name: Jorge Armando Solis Cruz
summary: Results-oriented Full-Stack Developer with extensive experience in PHP/Laravel. I combine strong ethical values and a disciplined approach with a passion for development and a high ability to adapt to new technologies. My analytical mindset and commitment to code quality and efficiency allow me to deliver innovative solutions that meet both project and organizational goals.

experiences.title: Full-Stack Developer
experiences.description: Technical leadership and development throughout the full lifecycle of highly critical enterprise web platforms (ERP and E-commerce). Specialized in the architecture and implementation of robust systems using Laravel and Vue.js, optimizing data persistence and business scalability.
responsibilities: Design and architecture of critical ERP modules focused on financial management, inventory, and automated reporting using PHP/Laravel and MySQL.
Led the migration and modernization of frontend interfaces using Vue 3 and optimized component reactivity.
Designed, documented, and implemented RESTful APIs integrated with payment gateways (Stripe, webhooks) and third-party services.
Optimized complex SQL queries and database design, reducing backend response times in transactional modules.
Implemented clean architectures (Repository Pattern, Service Layers) and ensured code quality through automated testing and code coverage.
Provided technical mentorship to junior developers and actively collaborated in agile cells under the SCRUM framework.

experiences.title: Software Developer
experiences.description: Participating as a developer at MyShell, implementing new features in existing npm packages for Vue.js and developing custom tools that optimize developer workflows.

experiences.title: General Mechanic
experiences.description: Corrective and preventive maintenance for internal combustion vehicles.

education.description: Training in software development, networks, and databases.
